title: Hardware Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Hardware problems involve the physical parts of your computer.
• A blank monitor? Check the cable and display input.
• A dead mouse or keyboard? Check the plug or battery.
• Start with the obvious: cables, power, and connections.

playgroundTask.goal: You diagnosed and fixed a hardware problem
playgroundTask.scenario: The monitor is not showing a picture

steps.say: There's a display problem. Read the error message first.
Check that the video cable is properly connected.
The cable looks fine. Try switching the display input source.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed a hardware problem! Always check cables and connections before assuming something is broken.
drDigitalHint: Read the error, then try the physical checks: cable first, then display input.
